name: StepperTabs
description: Auto-advancing stepper carousel with dot nav progress fill, sidebar labels, and stacked card transitions. 6-column grid layout with nav on the left and content cards on the right.

items.description: Step definitions — each needs a unique value, display label, and step number

defaultValue.description: Initial active step for uncontrolled mode

stepDuration.description: Time per step in ms (0 disables auto-advance)

children.description: StepperTabs.Nav and StepperTabs.Panels with nested StepperTabs.Panel cards

examples.name: Basic stepper
examples.code:
<StepperTabs.Root items={items} defaultValue="ide" autoAdvance stepDuration={4000}>
  <StepperTabs.Nav />
  <StepperTabs.Panels>
    <StepperTabs.Panel value="ide">
      <StepperTabs.PanelTitle>Title</StepperTabs.PanelTitle>
      <StepperTabs.PanelBody>Description text</StepperTabs.PanelBody>
      <Button>Learn more</Button>
    </StepperTabs.Panel>
  </StepperTabs.Panels>
</StepperTabs.Root>
